languages.text: Каждый вдох вызывает мучительную боль. Каждый выдох наполнен привкусом крови. Каждый глоток воздуха может стать последним.

traits.locale_text: Каждый вдох вызывает мучительную боль. Каждый выдох наполнен привкусом крови. Каждый глоток воздуха может стать последним.

languages.text: Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.
languages.original_text: Каждый вдох вызывает мучительную боль. Каждый выдох наполнен привкусом крови. Каждый глоток воздуха может стать последним.

traits.locale_text: Every breath brings agonising pain. Every exhale is filled with the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.
Every breath brings agonising pain. Every exhale is filled with the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.
Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.
Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.
Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.
Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.

languages.text: Cada respiración es agónica. Cada exhalación sabe a sangre. No se sabe si la próxima respiración llegará a producirse.
languages.original_text: Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.

traits.locale_text: Cada respiración es agónica. Cada exhalación sabe a sangre. No se sabe si la próxima respiración llegará a producirse.

languages.text: 每一次吸气都伴随着剧痛，每一次呼气都带着血腥味。下一口气，也许永远不会再来。
languages.original_text: Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.

traits.locale_text: 每一次吸气都伴随着剧痛，每一次呼气都带着血腥味。下一口气，也许永远不会再来。

languages.text: Chaque inspiration est source d'agonie. Chaque expiration porte en elle le goût du sang. Le prochain souffle ne viendra peut-être jamais.
languages.original_text: Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.

traits.locale_text: Chaque inspiration est source d'agonie. Chaque expiration porte en elle le goût du sang. Le prochain souffle ne viendra peut-être jamais.

languages.text: Alınan her nefes acı veriyor. Verilen her nefes, kan tadı taşıyor. Bu son soluk olabilir.
languages.original_text: Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.

traits.locale_text: Alınan her nefes acı veriyor. Verilen her nefes, kan tadı taşıyor. Bu son soluk olabilir.

languages.text: 一呼吸ごとに苦痛が走る。息を吐くたびに血の味がする。次の一息は、二度と訪れないかもしれない。
languages.original_text: Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.

traits.locale_text: 一呼吸ごとに苦痛が走る。息を吐くたびに血の味がする。次の一息は、二度と訪れないかもしれない。

languages.text: Jeder Atemzug bedeutet Schmerz. Jedes Ausatmen schmeckt nach Blut. Der nächste Atemzug kommt vielleicht nie.
languages.original_text: Every breath brings agony. Every exhale carries the taste of blood. The next breath might never come.

traits.locale_text: Jeder Atemzug bedeutet Schmerz. Jedes Ausatmen schmeckt nach Blut. Der nächste Atemzug kommt vielleicht nie.
